Supported Data Formats

Our AI can automatically detect columns from any Excel format. For best results, your file should contain:

  • Invoice Number & Date
  • Party Name / GSTIN (optional)
  • HSN/SAC Code (optional)
  • Taxable Value, Tax Rate, Tax Amount
  • CGST, SGST, IGST breakdown (optional)

Risk Categories

High Risk

  • Invoice not in GSTR-2B at all
  • Supplier GSTIN cancelled/suspended
  • Invoice date > 1 year old

Medium Risk

  • Tax amount mismatch
  • GSTIN mismatch
  • Invoice number mismatch

Low Risk

  • Minor date differences
  • Rounding differences
  • Invoice pending upload

Missing ITC Finder

Discover unclaimed ITC in GSTR-2B that you haven't utilized

₹0
Unclaimed ITC Available
0
Invoices in 2B Not in Books
0
Expiring This Month

Why Missing ITC Matters

GSTR-2B contains auto-populated ITC from your suppliers. If these invoices are not recorded in your books, you're missing legitimate ITC claims. Under Section 16(4), ITC must be claimed within the due date of filing return for September of next FY or annual return, whichever is earlier.

How to Find Missing ITC
1

Download GSTR-2B

From GST Portal → Returns → GSTR-2B

2

Upload Your Books

Your purchase register Excel

3

Auto-Compare

We find invoices in 2B not in your books

4

Claim ITC!

Record & claim before deadline

Missing ITC Details

Upload your Purchase Register to compare with GSTR-2B data

Smart Recommendations

Claim Missed ITC from Capital Goods

High Impact
₹1,85,000

You have unclaimed ITC of ₹1.85L on machinery purchased in Q2. This can be claimed in GSTR-3B for January.

Switch to Composition Scheme for Branch

Medium Impact
₹65,000

Your Tamil Nadu branch has turnover below ₹1.5Cr. Consider composition scheme for simplified compliance and lower rates.

Optimize Payment Timing

Medium Impact
₹35,000

Scheduling large purchases at month-end can improve cash flow by ₹35,000 annually through better ITC timing.

AI Tax Advisor

Your intelligent GST assistant powered by advanced AI

GPT-4 Turbo • Online

Chat History

ITC Eligibility Query 2 mins ago
RCM on Rent 1 hour ago
E-Invoice Threshold Yesterday
GST Advisor AI
Hello! I'm your AI-powered GST Tax Advisor. I can help you with:
  • GST law interpretations and clarifications
  • ITC eligibility analysis
  • HSN/SAC classification
  • Compliance requirements
  • Tax planning strategies
How can I assist you today?
Can I claim ITC on office renovation expenses?
GST Advisor AI
ITC on Office Renovation - Analysis:

Under Section 17(5)(c) of CGST Act, ITC is blocked for works contract services used for construction of immovable property (other than plant and machinery).

However, you CAN claim ITC on:
  • ✅ Electrical fittings (AC, lights) - if removable
  • ✅ Furniture & fixtures - movable items
  • ✅ IT equipment installation
  • ✅ Security systems
You CANNOT claim ITC on:
  • ❌ Civil construction work
  • ❌ Permanent fixtures
  • ❌ Flooring & wall treatments
Reference: CGST Act Section 17(5)(c), Circular 123/42/2019-GST

QRMP Scheme Optimizer

Quarterly vs Monthly filing advisor

Eligibility Check

QRMP Scheme Recommended

Based on your turnover and transaction volume

Quarterly (QRMP)

  • File GSTR-1 quarterly
  • Use IFF for B2B monthly
  • Less compliance burden
  • Cash flow flexibility
Save ~₹15,000/year in compliance costs

Monthly (Regular)

  • File GSTR-1 monthly
  • Higher compliance
  • Faster ITC reflection
  • More CA fees
Better for high-volume B2B
